name: Herb Spinanch Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach according to package directions; drain well and squeeze out excess liquid.
2. Combine the drained spinach with the remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
5. Uncover and bake for an additional 5 minutes or until set.
